response.prompt: Before we move on, please enter your Prolific ID first
Your signature (It can be your preferred name)
Do you consent to the study and wish to continue?
You have been disqualified from this study.

Audio Speaker Test.instruction: Please click the **[Play Speaker Test Audio]** button in the right center of the screen to listen to which numbers the audio said. It should have 4 numbers, and below you need to select the correct 4 numbers you heard from the audio. We suggest that you play the audio several times to make sure you hear the numbers.

response.prompt: Please select the correct numbers you heard
You have been disqualified from this study.
Please click this button [Yes] to continue.

JuicyChart_1_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: After you click to select a point, a details box appears, and you'll see it is selected and listed on the right.

response.prompt: Click the leftmost point on the chart (the point closest to the left edge). What is its Affiliation?
Still on the leftmost point, what is its Parameters value shown in the details box?
Click the lowest point of **[Not specified]** affiliation (the yellow points) on the chart. What is its name?
Still on the lowest yellow point, what is its Parameters value shown in the details box?

JuicyChart_2_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Drag to pan the map, and scroll to zoom in or out. Click a country to select it. You can select multiple countries to compare their values. Click “Clear selection” to remove all selected countries.

response.prompt: Find and click **Mexico**. What value is shown for Mexico?
Find and click **India**. What value is shown for India?
Find and click **Germany** (it should be under Norway). What value is shown for Germany?
Between **Mexico**, **India**, and **Germany**, which country has the highest value?

JuicyChart_2_1.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Drag to pan the map, and scroll to zoom in or out. Click a country to select it. You can select multiple countries to compare their values. Click “Clear selection” to remove all selected countries.

response.prompt: Find and click **Mexico**. What value is shown for Mexico?
Find and click **India**. What value is shown for India?
Find and click **Germany** (it should be under Norway). What value is shown for Germany?
Between **Mexico**, **India**, and **Germany**, which country has the highest value?

JuicyChart_3_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Select one energy source type button below, then drag the slider (at bottom-right) to reorder countries from High to Low or from Low to High. You can hover over a country's bar to see its value.

response.prompt: Which country is ranked 4th highest for the **Hydropower** energy source type?
Which country is ranked 5th highest for the **Oil** energy source type?
Which country is ranked 3th highes for the **Solar** energy source type?
Which country is ranked 4th highest for the **Wind** energy source type?

JuicyChart_4_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Select a year in the first page's chart (it shows **Currently Selected: [YEAR]**), then use the bottom slider or mouse wheel to switch between different infographics of your selected year.

response.prompt: Click the year 2020 and switch to different infographics. What value is shown for the **Fish & Seafood** segment in China?
In the year 2020, which country has the largest **Poultry** share in its infographic bar?
Go back to re-select a different year. What is the **total value** shown at the end of the bar for Japan in the year 2017?
For the year 2013, which country has the largest **Pork** share in its infographic bar?

JuicyChart_5_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Left-click a rectangle to drill in. Right-click to go back. Hover to see the tooltip number.

Which age groups of Mexico in the year 2015 has largest population?
Which age groups in the United States in 2023 have the largest population?

JuicyChart_6_0.instruction: Please **TRY YOUR BEST** to find the answers from the infographic. **[Instruction]**: Use the controls on the right to filter (**Focus Year**, **Gini min/max**, **Regions**). Hover a line to see a country tooltip.

response.prompt: In the year 1993, how many countries had a Gini index above 0.43?
In the year 2008, which country in South America had the lowest Gini index?
In the year 2015, how many countries in North America had a Gini index below 0.47?
In the year 2018, which country in Asia had the highest Gini index?

JuicyChart_7_0.instruction: Use the **Focus Year** slider to set the year. Click a dot or line to select a country, and the bottom-right will show the related countries to the selected country.

response.prompt: Which country had the highest % of internet use in 2005?
Which country had the highest % of internet use in 2000?
What were the three top related countries to Iceland in 2009?
What were the two countries with internet use above 60% in 2001?
